Compliance validation of safety-belt reminder

relationships.description: Requirement 5.5.3 concerns the removal of the safety-belt.
Requirement 5.5.3 concerns not damaging the anchorage during removal.
General tests may be carried out on a vehicle structure.
General tests may be carried out on a completely finished vehicle.
General tests may be restricted to one seat or group of seats.
Restricted tests require anchorages to have same structural characteristics.
Restricted tests require seats to have same structural characteristics.
Seat position selection is performed by the technical service.
Seat position selection aims for the most adverse conditions.
